indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is not suitable for sleep, as it is designed for eating and socializing, not resting.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: The white chairs are not suitable for sleep, as they are designed for sitting and eating, not resting.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is not suitable for sleep, as it is cold and hard, and can cause discomfort.

indicators.name: blue wall art
indicators.rationale: Blue wall art is not suitable for sleep, as it is not related to the activity and may be distracting.

indicators.name: white radiator
indicators.rationale: White radiator is not suitable for sleep, as it is not related to the activity and may be distracting.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The presence of a dining table and chairs, along with hard flooring and unrelated wall art, makes this space unsuitable for sleep. The white radiator also does not contribute to a comfortable sleep environment.
